2604.13786.title: QuantileMark: A Message-Symmetric Multi-bit Watermark for LLMs
2604.13786.paper_summary: As large language models become standard backends for content generation, practical provenance increasingly requires multi-bit watermarking. In provider-internal deployments, a key requirement is message symmetry: the message itself should not systematically affect either text quality or verification outcomes. Vocabulary-partition watermarks can break message symmetry in low-entropy decoding: some messages are assigned most of the probability mass, while others are forced to use tail tokens. This makes embedding quality and message decoding accuracy message-dependent. We propose QuantileMark, a white-box multi-bit watermark that embeds messages within the continuous cumulative probability interval $[0, 1)$. At each step, QuantileMark partitions this interval into $M$ equal-mass bins and samples strictly from the bin assigned to the target symbol, ensuring a fixed $1/M$ probability budget regardless of context entropy. For detection, the verifier reconstructs the same partition under teacher forcing, computes posteriors over latent bins, and aggregates evidence for verification. We prove message-unbiasedness, a property ensuring that the base distribution is recovered when averaging over messages. This provides a theoretical foundation for generation-side symmetry, while the equal-mass design additionally promotes uniform evidence strength across messages on the detection side. Empirical results on C4 continuation and LFQA show improved multi-bit recovery and detection robustness over strong baselines, with negligible impact on generation quality. Our code is available at GitHub (https://github.com/zzzjunlin/QuantileMark).
2604.13786.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型成為內容生成的標準後端，實際的來源驗證越來越需要多位元水印。在提供者內部部署中，一個關鍵要求是消息對稱性：消息本身不應系統性地影響文本質量或驗證結果。詞彙分區水印在低熵解碼中可能會打破消息對稱性：某些消息被分配了大部分的概率質量，而其他消息則被迫使用尾部標記。這使得嵌入質量和消息解碼準確性依賴於消息。我們提出了QuantileMark，一種白盒多位元水印，將消息嵌入連續累積概率區間$[0, 1)$中。在每一步中，QuantileMark將此區間劃分為$M$個等質量的箱子，並嚴格從分配給目標符號的箱子中抽樣，確保無論上下文熵如何，固定的$1/M$概率預算。對於檢測，驗證者在教師強制下重建相同的分區，計算潛在箱子的後驗，並聚合證據以進行驗證。我們證明了消息無偏性，這是一個確保在對消息取平均時恢復基礎分佈的特性。這為生成端的對稱性提供了理論基礎，而等質量設計進一步促進了檢測端跨消息的均勻證據強度。在C4延續和LFQA上的實證結果顯示，相較於強基準，改進了多位元恢復和檢測穩健性，對生成質量的影響微乎其微。我們的代碼可在GitHub上獲得 (https://github.com/zzzjunlin/QuantileMark)。
2604.13786.author: Junlin Zhu et.al.
2604.13786.authors: Junlin Zhu, Baizhou Huang, Xiaojun Wan
